items.title: Visa (V) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
items.description: In the most recent trading session, Visa (V) closed at $353.85, indicating a +1.5% shift from the previous trading day.

items.title: Visa Inc. (V) Defeats Lawsuit Over Vanilla Gift Card Scam
items.description: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is among the 13 Best Big Name Stocks to Buy Now. Last week, a U.S. district judge dismissed a class action lawsuit by consumers, accusing the company of failing to warn that its Vanilla gift cards were susceptible to theft. The case was brought by Ira Schuman of New York, who sued Visa […]

items.title: Visa Inc. (V), Mastercard Merchant Fees Infringe Competition Law, UK Tribunal Rules
items.description: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is among the Goldman Sachs Stock Portfolio: 10 Large-Cap Stocks To Buy. On Friday, a British tribunal ruled that Visa and Mastercard’s default multilateral interchange fees charged to retailers breach European competition law. The development comes as the latest round of litigation over multilateral interchange fees, which has rumbled on for decades. David […]

items.title: Apple Loses Bid to Dismiss Justice Department Antitrust Suit
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- Apple Inc. lost its bid to throw out an antitrust case brought by the US Justice Department and a group of state attorneys general on Monday, a victory for the aggressive posture taken during the Biden administration and carried on by enforcers under President Donald Trump.Most Read from BloombergStruggling Downtowns Are Looking to Lure New CrowdsPhiladelphia Transit System Votes to Cut Service by 45%, Hike FaresSqueezed by Crowds, the Roads of Central Park Are Being ReimaginedSpr

items.title: NYLI Epoch Global Choice ADR Q1 2025 Commentary
items.description: The Epoch Global Choice SMA ADR declined 2.2% (gross) and 3.0% (Net), slightly lagging the 1.8% decline of the MSCI World Index. Click here to read the full commentary.
